val=breakdown[key]||0;const isNeg=val<0;const maxAbs=Math.max(Math.abs(meta.max),15);const barWidth=Math.abs(val)/maxAbs*100;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-2",style:{fontSize:13},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{width:24},children:meta.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-muted",style:{width:140,flexShrink:0},children:meta.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{flex:1,display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:8},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"score-bar",style:{flex:1},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"fill",style:{width:`${Math.min(barWidth,100)}%`,background:isNeg?'var(--red)':val>0?'var(--green)':'var(--muted)'}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"font-mono font-bold",style:{width:40,textAlign:'right',color:isNeg?'var(--red)':val>0?'var(--green)':'var(--muted)'},children:[val>0?'+':'',val]})]})]},key);})})]})]});}export default StockDetail;

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { formatNum, formatPct, gradeClass, getScoreColor } from '../App'; const EXPERT_LABELS = { a1_nifty_above_dma: 'Nifty above 20 & 50 DMA', a2_breadth_supportive: 'Market breadth >= 55% above 200 EMA', b1_sector_strong: 'Sector strength >= 55', b2_sector_peers_breaking: 'Sector peers in breakout zone', c1_base_consolidation: '3-6 week consolidation / base formed', c2_price_structure_ok: 'Higher lows / tight range', d1_breakout_confirmed: 'Price at or above resistance', d2_candle_quality_ok: 'Strong candle — high delivery', e1_volume_surge: 'Breakout volume >= 1.5x average', e2_volume_contraction: 'Volume contraction after surge', f1_indicators_aligned: 'RSI 52-68, ADX >= 20, Supertrend BUY', g1_stoploss_defined: 'Stop-loss defined, risk <= 7%', g2_rr_minimum: 'Risk : Reward >= 1:2', }; const SCORE_LABELS = { delivery: { label: 'Delivery %', max: 12, icon: '📦' }, fii_dii: { label: 'FII/DII Flow', max: 6, icon: '🌐' }, bulk_deal: { label: 'Bulk/Block Deals', max: 12, icon: '📋' }, promoter: { label: 'Promoter Activity', max: 10, icon: '👔' }, vix: { label: 'India VIX', max: 8, icon: '📊' }, oi_buildup: { label: 'OI Buildup', max: 10, icon: '📈' }, pcr: { label: 'PCR Signal', max: 6, icon: '📉' }, compression: { label: 'Compression', max: 14, icon: '🔄' }, vol_dryup: { label: 'Volume Dry-up', max: 8, icon: '🏜️' }, base_position: { label: 'Base Position', max: 8, icon: '🏗️' }, supertrend: { label: 'Supertrend', max: 10, icon: '📡' }, ema_alignment: { label: 'EMA Alignment', max: 6, icon: '📏' }, rsi: { label: 'RSI', max: 9, icon: '📐' }, adx: { label: 'ADX Trend', max: 8, icon: '💪' }, weekly_trend: { label: 'Weekly Trend', max: 6, icon: '📅' }, golden_cross: { label: 'Golden Cross', max: 8, icon: '✨' }, freshness: { label: 'Freshness', max: 0, icon: '⏰' }, }; function StockDetail({ api }) { const { symbol } = useParams(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [stock, setStock] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [tab, setTab] = useState('overview'); useEffect(() => { fetch(`${api}/api/stock/${symbol}`) .then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Not found'); return r.json(); }) .then(d => { setStock(d); setLoading(false); }) .catch(() => setLoading(false)); }, [api, symbol]); if (loading) return
Loading stock analysis...
; if (!stock) return (
navigate(-1)}>← Back

Stock {symbol} not found in latest scan.

); const ts = stock.trade_setup || {}; const checks = stock.expert_checks || {}; const breakdown = stock.score_breakdown || {}; const promo = stock.promoter_data || {}; return (
navigate(-1)}>← Back to Screener
{/* Header */}
{stock.symbol} {stock.grade} {stock.is_fno && F&O} {stock.expert_decision}
{stock.name} — {stock.sector} — {stock.stage}
{formatNum(stock.price)}
= 0 ? 'up' : 'down'} style={{ fontSize: 16 }}> {formatPct(stock.chg_1d)} today
{/* Tabs */}
{['overview', 'expert', 'trade', 'institutional', 'breakdown'].map(t => (
setTab(t)}> {t.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + t.slice(1)}
))}
{/* Overview Tab */} {tab === 'overview' && (
{/* Score + Key Metrics */}
Composite Score
{stock.score}/100
Confidence
{stock.confidence_pct}%
RS Alpha
= 0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)' }}> {stock.rs_alpha >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{stock.rs_alpha?.toFixed(2)}
Percentile: {stock.rs_percentile}th
Expert Check
= 10 ? 'var(--green)' : stock.expert_yes >= 7 ? 'var(--cyan)' : 'var(--red)' }}> {stock.expert_yes}/13
{stock.expert_decision}
{/* Price Changes */}
Price Performance
{[['1 Day', stock.chg_1d], ['5 Days', stock.chg_5d], ['1 Month', stock.chg_1m], ['3 Months', stock.chg_3m]].map(([label, val]) => (
{label}
= 0 ? 'up' : 'down'}`} style={{ fontSize: 18 }}> {formatPct(val)}
))}
{/* Technicals Row */}
Technicals
{[ ['RSI', stock.rsi?.toFixed(1), stock.rsi >= 50 && stock.rsi <= 68 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--amber)'], ['ADX', stock.adx?.toFixed(1), stock.adx >= 25 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)'], ['Delivery %', stock.delivery_pct?.toFixed(1) + '%', stock.delivery_pct >= 55 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)'], ['Vol Ratio', stock.vol_ratio?.toFixed(2) + 'x', stock.vol_ratio >= 1.5 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)'], ['BB Width', stock.bb_width?.toFixed(1), stock.bb_width < 8 ? 'var(--cyan)' : 'var(--muted)'], ['% from 52W High', formatPct(stock.pct_from_high), stock.pct_from_high >= -5 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)'], ].map(([label, val, color]) => (
{label} {val}
))}
EMA Levels
{[ ['EMA 21', stock.ema_21], ['EMA 50', stock.ema_50], ['EMA 200', stock.ema_200], ].map(([label, val]) => { const aboveBelow = stock.price > val; return (
{label} {formatNum(val)} {aboveBelow ? 'Above' : 'Below'}
); })}
Active Signals
{(stock.active_signals || []).map((sig, i) => ( {sig.replace(/[🔥🟢✅📈📋🚨💀🌟🕯📶🎯⚡⚠️]/g, '').trim()} ))} {(!stock.active_signals || stock.active_signals.length === 0) && ( No active signals )}
)} {/* Expert Checklist Tab */} {tab === 'expert' && (
13-Point Expert Decision Checklist
= 10 ? 'var(--green)' : stock.expert_yes >= 7 ? 'var(--cyan)' : 'var(--red)', fontSize: 20 }}> {stock.expert_yes}/13 YES {stock.expert_yes >= 10 ? 'CONVICTION TRADE — Aggressive position' : stock.expert_yes >= 7 ? 'NORMAL TRADE — Standard position' : 'SKIP — No trade regardless of score'}
{stock.expert_decision}
{Object.entries(EXPERT_LABELS).map(([key, label]) => { const passed = checks[key]; const category = key.split('_')[0]; const categoryLabels = { a1: 'A. Market Context', a2: 'A. Market Context', b1: 'B. Sector', b2: 'B. Sector', c1: 'C. Price Structure', c2: 'C. Price Structure', d1: 'D. Breakout Quality', d2: 'D. Breakout Quality', e1: 'E. Volume', e2: 'E. Volume', f1: 'F. Indicators', g1: 'G. Risk Setup', g2: 'G. Risk Setup', }; return (
{passed ? '✓' : '✗'}
{key.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase()} {label}
); })}
)} {/* Key Technical Levels Tab */} {tab === 'trade' && (
Key Technical Levels — {ts.setup_type || 'N/A'}
Entry
{formatNum(ts.entry)}
Stop Loss
{formatNum(ts.stop_loss)}
Target 1
{formatNum(ts.target1)}
Target 2
{formatNum(ts.target2)}
Risk %
{ts.risk_pct?.toFixed(2)}%
R:R Ratio
= 2 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--amber)' }}> 1:{ts.rr_ratio?.toFixed(1)}
Setup Type
{ts.setup_type || '—'}
{/* Position Sizing Calculator */}
Position Sizing (₹5,00,000 Capital / 2% Risk)
{(() => { const capital = 500000; const riskPct = 2; const riskAmount = capital * riskPct / 100; const riskPerShare = (ts.entry || 0) - (ts.stop_loss || 0); const qty = riskPerShare > 0 ? Math.floor(riskAmount / riskPerShare) : 0; const posValue = qty * (ts.entry || 0); return (
Quantity
{qty}
Position Value
{formatNum(posValue)}
Max Risk
{formatNum(riskAmount)}
Risk/Share
{formatNum(riskPerShare)}
); })()}
)} {/* Institutional Tab */} {tab === 'institutional' && (
Promoter Activity (SEBI Data)
{[ ['Promoter Holding', `${promo.promoter_holding?.toFixed(2)}%`, 'var(--text)'], ['QoQ Change', formatPct(promo.promoter_chg_qoq), promo.promoter_chg_qoq >= 0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)'], ['Pledge %', `${promo.pledge_pct?.toFixed(2)}%`, promo.pledge_pct > 10 ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--green)'], ['Status', promo.promoter_buying ? 'BUYING' : promo.promoter_selling ? 'SELLING' : 'No change', promo.promoter_buying ? 'var(--green)' : promo.promoter_selling ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--muted)'], ].map(([label, val, color]) => (
{label} {val}
))}
Open Interest & Bulk Deals
OI Buildup {stock.oi_data?.buildup_type || 'N/A'}
OI Change % = 0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--red)' }}> {stock.oi_data?.oi_change_pct?.toFixed(2)}%
Bulk Buy {stock.bulk_deal?.bulk_buy ? 'YES' : 'No'}
Block Buy {stock.bulk_deal?.block_buy ? 'YES' : 'No'}
Bulk Sell {stock.bulk_deal?.bulk_sell ? 'YES — CAUTION' : 'No'}
)} {/* Score Breakdown Tab */} {tab === 'breakdown' && (
Score Breakdown — Total: {stock.score}/100
{Object.entries(SCORE_LABELS).map(([key, meta]) => { const val = breakdown[key] || 0; const isNeg = val < 0; const maxAbs = Math.max(Math.abs(meta.max), 15); const barWidth = Math.abs(val) / maxAbs * 100; return (
{meta.icon} {meta.label}
0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)' }} />
0 ? 'var(--green)' : 'var(--muted)' }}> {val > 0 ? '+' : ''}{val}
); })}
)}
); } export default StockDetail;
